description:
Implement `hx-link` (T1-04) — 6/6 enterprise libraries ship this. Styled anchor element with consistent design tokens.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-link/`:
- `index.ts` — re-export
- `hx-link.ts` — Lit component
- `hx-link.styles.ts` — CSS with `--hx-*` tokens
- `hx-link.stories.ts` — Storybook stories
- `hx-link.test.ts` — Vitest tests

**Props:** `href` (string), `target` (`_blank`|`_self`|`_parent`|`_top`), `rel` (string), `download` (string|boolean), `disabled` (boolean), `variant` (`default`|`subtle`|`danger`)

**Slots:** default (link text), `prefix` (icon before), `suffix` (icon after)

**Events:** `hx-click`

**CSS Parts:** `base` (the anchor element)

**ARIA:** When `disabled`, renders as `<span role="link" aria-disabled="true">`. When `target="_blank"`, adds visually-hidden "(opens in new tab)" text and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.

**Reference:** Study `hx-button` for the disabled-as-span pattern. Follow all project conventions.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests pass, axe-core zero violations, Storybook stories for all variants, CEM accurate, bundle < 5KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-link — T1-04 Hyperlink Component
